name: POI-triggered lockdown / scenario
tagline: 🚨 Person-of-interest spotted → activate a Command Access scenario (Lockdown / Shelter / Evacuate).
description: When a Verkada person-of-interest detection fires, automatically activate a configured Command Access scenario — Lockdown, Shelter-in-place, Evacuate, etc. Pick the scenario before enabling (use Sync scenarios on the Connections page if the list is empty). For a single-door action instead of a whole scenario, swap the action to Verkada: Unlock door or a Verkada API call pointed at a door-lockdown endpoint.
